'''Geminor''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lianna system/Legends|Lianna system]]. Its atmosphere consisted of a hot, dense poisonous gas and the planet was orbited by one single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

{{Planet-stub}}
